list() - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.CollegeModel
Fetches the complete comprehensive matrix ledger of all registered College entity profiles configured inside persistent data tables.

Fetches the complete comprehensive matrix ledger of all registered Course entity profiles configured inside persistent data tables.

Gets a complete list of all Roles available in the database.
